## Description

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect DOI, metadata, BibTeX)
- [ ] Taxonomy improvement
- [ ] Journal tier update
- [ ] Methodology refinement
- [ ] Benchmark update
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] For taxonomy changes, I updated `references/field-taxonomy.md`.
- [ ] For journal changes, I updated `references/journal-tiers.md`.
- [ ] For benchmark changes, I ran `python benchmark/scripts/run_benchmark.py --mode simulate --iterations 3`.
- [ ] I did not commit `benchmark/private-gold/` or `benchmark/workspace/`.
